description: Freshpaint is a healthcare-focused marketing performance and privacy platform that helps organizations collect, govern, and route customer data while supporting HIPAA-compliant marketing workflows. It provides web and app tracking, audience management, integrations, and analytics features.
summary: Freshpaint exposes one documented developer integration surface: a server-side HTTP API for sending events to Freshpaint, authenticated by an environment ID included in the request body; no public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was found.
